button.name: action_confirm
button.confirm: This will confirm the schedule and notify the assigned engineer. Continue?

button.name: action_start_test
button.confirm: Starting the test will lock the schedule details. The test clock begins now. Continue?

button.name: action_submit_review
button.confirm: Submit all test data for manager review? You will not be able to edit after submission.

button.name: action_cancel
button.confirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this job order?

field.name: scheduling_notes
field.placeholder: Write any special instructions, site conditions, or client requirements for the engineer...

div.div: Schedule Confirmed. Waiting for to start the test on . The engineer will click "▶ Start Test" to begin.

field.name: engineer_notes
field.placeholder: Record any field observations, deviations from SOP, equipment issues, or client feedback here...
